caption: A screen capture of a web browser shows a video conferencing call integrated with a digital whiteboard. In the upper right corner, a man wearing a black cap and a dark shirt is visible in a small video window. The main area of the screen displays a dark-themed conceptual map featuring several interconnected circular nodes and a white rectangular text box containing a flowchart. Legible text in the browser tabs includes "Trail & Learning by Systemdyn," "Elements by Systemdyn," "Future of Society by Systemdyn," "Insights | Introduction | Kumu," and "Rural Community Food System." In the address bar, the URL "blackboard.uul learning" is visible. Across the sequence of frames, the layout remains static; the man in the video window and the elements of the conceptual map do not change position or appearance, indicating a still moment during a presentation or online lesson.
